title: Branching Strategies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on common Git branching methodologies.

questions.question: Which Git branching strategy uses separate branches for development, production, and individual software releases?
Regarding the branching strategies, which one involves all developers working on a single, shared 'trunk' (main branch)?
What is 'Feature Branching' best suited for?
options: Small teams with single, fast development tasks
Complex project development where multiple features are built at the same time
